title: Gashua Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Gashua, with a Z-Score of +3.29. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Gashua is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 10.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 51%, and winds are blowing at 13.1 km/h, offering little relief. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, and highlighting the severity of the heat wave.
conclusion: Implement emergency measures to mitigate the heat wave's impact immediately.
